mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_sla_instance ( ticket_id, policy_id, first_response_deadline, resolve_deadline, breached ) VALUES ( #{ticketId}, #{policyId}, #{firstResponseDeadline}, #{resolveDeadline}, #{breached} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE policy_id = VALUES(policy_id), first_response_deadline = VALUES(first_response_deadline), resolve_deadline = VALUES(resolve_deadline), breached = VALUES(breached)
mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, policy_id, first_response_deadline, resolve_deadline, breached, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_sla_instance WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, ticket_id, policy_id, first_response_deadline, resolve_deadline, breached, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_sla_instance WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}

SELECT id, ticket_id, policy_id, first_response_deadline, resolve_deadline, breached, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_sla_instance WHERE breached = 0 AND (first_response_deadline <= #{now} OR resolve_deadline <= #{now}) ORDER BY resolve_deadline ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_sla_instance SET breached = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND breached = 0
